name: lightprobe-clear
title: LightProbe / Clear Auto
description: Remove auto-generated LightProbeGroup GameObjects from the scene. By default only removes groups whose name starts with 'LightProbeGroup_Auto'. Set removeAll=true to remove ALL LightProbeGroups.

parameters.name: removeAll
parameters.description: If true, remove ALL LightProbeGroups in the scene, not just auto-generated ones.
